items.title: As global 30×30 goal lags, Colombia shows how progress can be made
items.summary: Colombia's coordinated, ambitious plan illustrates how spatial prioritization can advance the lagging 30×30 protected-area target.

items.title: Voting Rights Act ruling reshapes how electoral districts are drawn
items.summary: A weakened Voting Rights Act changes the constraints and fairness criteria behind partisan and minority-representation districting.

items.title: New method is the fastest way to find the best routes
items.summary: A shortest-path algorithm breaks a 40-year “sorting barrier,” finding optimal routes across networks faster than ever.

items.title: Waiting times — Health at a Glance 2025
items.summary: Cross-country evidence on elective-surgery waiting times and the clinical prioritization policies that make them fairer.

items.title: Grids — Electricity 2026
items.summary: Grid investment and storage must scale sharply to connect stalled renewables and meet demand under growing uncertainty.

items.title: 5 logistics trends to watch in 2026
items.summary: AI-driven planning, rising last-mile rates and store-based fulfillment top the operations and logistics agenda for 2026.

items.title: Quality provision in cross-border higher education (OECD 2026 report)
items.summary: OECD's 2026 review finds external quality-assurance systems widely adopted, with gaps remaining for cross-border programmes.
